V7-1.title: Synthesis: pill below the rule + data-driven totals that justify the verdict
V7-1.spec: Move the verdict pill OUT of the Synthesis header's right slot (the header becomes caption + rule like the others, rule running to the prose right edge). Directly BELOW the header rule, render a verdict row: the pill (e.g. 'Toward Babel'), accompanied by a quiet stat line that justifies it, computed ENTIRELY from the loaded data (never hardcoded): total findings, findings by overall severity (strongest relation: N violate / M in tension), and principle aggregates (X of 7 principles violated, Y in tension). Example shape: pill + ' 8 findings — 2 violate, 6 strain · principles: 2 violated, 5 in tension' in small mono or secondary serif (var(--tx-2), AA both themes). Craft the exact layout/wording for restraint: it should read like evidence, not a dashboard. Keep the pill's existing ink/outline treatment and the visually-hidden 'Overall:' prefix; spacing between header, verdict row, and the first synthesis paragraph should breathe (~1.2-1.6rem). The .sh-right slot mechanism can stay in the code for future use or be removed if it becomes dead — your call, note it.

V7-2.title: Section headers: captions start at the rail origin (except Synthesis); rules in caption color; more vertical air
V7-2.spec: (a) For the scorecard header ('The findings, by principle'), the findings header ('The findings, in detail'), and the three closing headers — the caption text must START at the RAIL ORIGIN (the far-left edge where the scorecard's 01/02 markers and full-span hairlines begin), not at the content edge; their inline rules then fill from the caption's end to the SAME prose right edge as today. Implementation: span those header rows across the full grid (grid-column 1 / -1 or equivalent restructure) while keeping the right edge fixed; verify alignment with the scorecard's own .sc-group hairline left edge exactly. The SYNTHESIS header is explicitly EXEMPT: it stays at the content edge (per the owner). (b) Dividing-line color: the .sechead rules change from the hairline token to the SAME COLOR as the caption text (var(--tx-2)) in both themes, still 1px. (c) More space: increase vertical margins around all section header rows (~+50%, e.g. margin-top toward 3.2rem and margin-bottom toward 1.6rem — tune optically so sections breathe without floating). Check mobile <=680 (grid collapses to one column — captions there sit at the single left edge naturally) and print.

V7-3.title: Theme toggle: remove the box
V7-3.spec: Remove the border and background box from #theme-toggle so it is a bare sun/moon icon: keep the same hit area (padding stays), keep color var(--tx-2) -> var(--tx) on hover, the focus-visible ring (the ring is the focus affordance now — verify it still draws cleanly without the border), the transition, aria/title/D-key wiring, and position. Verify it remains clearly visible over the page background in both themes at the masthead and while scrolled (it is fixed — check it doesn't visually collide with code panels or images of text when overlapping content scrolls beneath it; if legibility suffers when content passes under it, a subtle backdrop treatment consistent with the page (e.g. a soft bg pill using var(--bg) at partial opacity) is acceptable — prefer nothing if it stays legible).

V7-4.title: Footer links open in new tabs
V7-4.spec: The two footer credit links (the skill release link to github.com/Cache-Atelier/magnificent-humanity-audit/releases/latest at ~line 1441 and the cacheatelier.work link at ~line 1445) get target="_blank" with rel="noopener noreferrer" (rel currently 'noopener' — extend it). Leave the masthead repository link and all internal anchors as they are. Print provenance (URL printing) must be unaffected.
